hero-subtext: Gentle, body-based coaching for women healing from heartbreak, betrayal, and relationship trauma.
videoSubtitle: Watch Shannon's story and discover a gentler path forward
prog-card1: Instant calm techniques for those overwhelming moments when the pain feels unbearable.
prog-card2: A gentle, guided week of somatic healing practices to begin releasing the weight you're carrying.
prog-card3: A comprehensive 8-week transformation program that guides you from heartbreak to wholeness.
prog-card4: Personalized, premium support with Shannon for your unique healing journey.
about-quote: I didn't just study healing — I lived it.
about-body1: After experiencing the devastation of betrayal and divorce, I discovered that true healing doesn't happen by thinking your way through it — it happens in the body.
about-body2: I trained in somatic experiencing, nervous system regulation, and trauma-informed coaching to understand the science behind why heartbreak hurts so physically — and how to actually release it.
about-body3: Today, I support women around the world who are navigating heartbreak or divorce and want a different way to heal.
step1-body: As soon as you join, you'll receive instant access to your healing portal.
step2-body: Over the next 7 days, you'll be guided through daily practices to release tension and reconnect with your body.
step3-body: You'll feel lighter, clearer, more in tune with yourself. The chaos begins to settle.
r1-text: I can't believe how much hurt I was holding onto! This was such a safe space for healing.
r2-text: I couldn't show up for my kids. This program helped me let go of the past and show up for the here and now.
r3-text: Rise Above Heartbreak came into my life when I felt completely lost. I finally feel free.
cta-h2: Ready to Take the First Gentle Step?
cta-sub: You're not alone — and you don't have to do this by yourself.
footer-desc: I support women healing from heartbreak by helping them gently reconnect with their nervous system, their bodies, and their inner wisdom.
